idea-plugin.name: JSONL Log Viewer
idea-plugin.description:
Renders .jsonl files (JSON-per-line structured logs) in a readable plain-text format side-by-side with the raw JSON. Each line becomes: 
<local-timestamp> <level> <target>: <message> <k=v> ...
The preview updates live as you edit the raw file.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.3.0 — independent Left/Right pane selectors (Raw / Formatted / Inspect / Off), exposed as toggle buttons in the toolbar. Inspect tracks the formatted pane's caret, falling back to the raw pane's caret when formatted isn't visible.
  • 0.2.0 — four view modes (Raw, Formatted, Split, Inspect).
  • 0.1.0 — initial release with split raw/formatted editor for .jsonl files.

action.description: Set the JSONL log Filter textbox to the selected text
